title: French With Panache
author: Violaine Prior et Nathan Mergy
description: 🇫🇷 Improve your French with our conversations. We’re Violaine &amp; Nathan, two journalists and certified teachers. We discuss topics about French society (lifestyle, politics, social issues…) &amp; so much more, always with fun and nuance. For intermediate &amp; advanced learners. 👉 More content on patreon.com/frenchwithpanache 🌐 Our website: www.frenchwithpanache.com
